name: Arcian Truthsteel
title: the Abyssal Demon
lore: Originally a Templar from Everlight, the Bastion of the Valorians, Arcian was exiled when he destroyed one of the five noble houses, Skyforge and killed their Pillar. His Soulforge, Monochrome, grants him the ability to remove the colour of all matters, rendering all other abilities useless. This ability can be molded into any shape, which he often uses for his cloak, wolf and all the blades that he carries. Each blade is crafted from a formidable opponent that he has faced, and the most dangerous one is the rumoured crimson blade which also carries the millions of souls whom entrusted their faith in him.

abilities.name: Monochrome Blade
abilities.details: Arcian's basic attacks deal bonus [ap]magical damage[/] (scaling with [ap]magical power[/]), and [db]steals[/] a small amount of the target's [mp]mana[/].

abilities.name: Phantom Slash
abilities.details: Arcian slashes twice at a target, each dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/]). Each hit is counted as a basic attack.

abilities.name: Spectral Arsenal
abilities.details: Arcian enters a spectral state for a few seconds, gaining bonus [ms]movement speed[/] that decays over time and the ability to pass through units.[n]While in this state, a percentage of damage dealt by enemy heroes is stored and dealt over a few seconds instead.[n]If an enemy hero dies within a few seconds of Arcian damaging them, the remaining stored damage will be removed.

abilities.name: Void Steps
abilities.details: Arcian blinks to the enemy target, dealing bonus [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/]) to all nearby enemies upon arrival.[n]If this ability hits only one enemy hero, the damage is [bf]increased[/], but if it hits more than one enemy hero, its cooldown will be [bf]halved[/] instead.

abilities.name: Oblivion's Decree
abilities.details: Arcian enters a heightened state for several seconds, gaining bonus [as]attack speed[/].[n]During this state, Arcian replaces his Monochrome Blade with the Oblivion Blade, making his basic attack deals [td]true damage[/] instead of magical damage.[n]In addition, the first basic attack or Phantom Slash on each unique enemy hero will briefly [db]silence[/] the target.
